overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The player walks along orange-tiled sidewalks past the ORBITAL AIR building, passes under a concrete overpass with a street food vendor, and explores a plaza with a distinctive cylindrical tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with corporate building and neon signage

events.description: black SUV and other vehicles drive past on the wet street to the right
slight left turn to navigate around oncoming pedestrian with umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-tiled sidewalk next to the busy street with the ORBITAL AIR building visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking toward the camera
black SUV driving along the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: tall modern building with large green neon ORBITAL AIR signage on the facade
distinctive bright orange patterned pavement covering the pedestrian walkway
tall illuminated street lamp casting light on the wet pavement
large glowing advertisement sign on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked futuristic city street at night, dominated by the green neon glow of the ORBITAL AIR building. The player walks along the distinctive orange-tiled sidewalk as vehicles pass on the wet road, navigating around pedestrians with umbrellas walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching and entering concrete overpass structure

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the large concrete overpass structure
lighting shifts from bright neon to darker shadows under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as it enters the shadow of a massive brutalist concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella and teal pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive brutalist concrete bridge overhead with thick support pillars
green metal safety fence running along the edge of the sidewalk
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The player walks toward and enters a large concrete overpass structure, transitioning from the open neon-lit street into a more sheltered, shadowy environment. The orange tiles continue under the overpass as the camera passes thick support pillars and green metal railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian area under overpass with street food vendor

events.description: approaching street food vendor with visible grill and rising steam
slowing down and turning slightly toward the vendor area

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and approaching a street food vendor setup where people are gathered

notable_agents.action: food vendor working at a grill with steam rising from the cooking surface
person with green hair and cybernetic implants standing near the vendor

entered.detail: street food cooking setup with steam, utensils, and warming lights
large rectangular planters with spiky plants and integrated lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti art under the overpass
staircase leading up to the overpass level

segments.scene_description: Under the overpass, the scene features a street food vendor area with a active grill and steam rising. The player moves past concrete planters with spiky plants and graffiti-covered walls, while NPCs gather around the food stall in the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with benches and cylindrical tower structure

events.description: exiting the covered overpass into the open plaza area
moving into darker plaza area with ambient lighting from benches and signs

agents.ego_description: leaving the overpass and entering a rain-soaked plaza with benches and distinctive architecture

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: tall distinctive tower with red horizontal ring lighting and glass facade
illuminated wooden benches along the plaza walkway
damaged yellow car on display or abandoned near the plaza edge
industrial structure with corrugated metal walls and horizontal slats

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the player enters a darker open plaza with wet concrete pavement. A distinctive cylindrical tower with red lighting rises in the distance, while illuminated benches line the path and a wrecked vehicle sits to the left. The area feels more secluded with scattered pedestrians sitting on benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza walkway with benches approaching cylindrical tower

events.description: continuing along the curved path toward the illuminated tower

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved path through the plaza, passing benches with seated individuals while approaching the tower

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket sitting on bench looking at the surroundings

entered.detail: winding asphalt pathway with orange painted edges leading through the plaza
planters with tall grasses and plants integrated with bench seating

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along a curved asphalt path with orange edges, moving closer to the cylindrical tower with red ring lighting. The plaza features integrated bench-planters with vegetation, and a few individuals sit on the illuminated benches in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, moving from a vibrant neon-lit street into a sheltered underpass and finally into a secluded urban plaza. It begins on an orange-tiled sidewalk dominated by the green glow of the ORBITAL AIR building, navigating through a crowd of pedestrians with umbrellas. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into the shadowy environment of a concrete overpass, where the view shifts to thick support pillars and a steaming street food vendor surrounded by graffiti-covered walls. The scene then opens up as the player exits the shelter into a darker plaza of wet concrete, passing a wrecked vehicle and illuminated benches. Finally, the path curves along asphalt edges toward a towering cylindrical structure accented with red ring lighting, while scattered figures rest in the rainy night.
